title: Activity log for item view permission
excerpt: With Item view permission is activated on the board board members want ability to see item activity log for the items they are assigned to in people column.

posts.author: ShwetaShah (Shweta Shah)
posts.cookedHtml: With Item view permission is activated on the board board members want ability to see item activity log for the items they are assigned to in people column.

posts.author: Gzee (Greg Zarick)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, this is a problem we have as well. With Permissions set to “View only opportunities that are assigned to users or created by them in any “People” column”, it seems obvious that people that can see their items should be able to see the History Activity. But currently you cannot. Please make item history available to people that can see them!
